committee.attentionNeeded: This needs your attention today — everything else is running on its own.
committee.allClear: Nothing needs a decision today. The building is running itself.
committee.overdueBody: {{units}}{{more}}, {{sum}} total. The reminder text is ready to go.
committee.reminderNote: one click, the text is already drafted
committee.voteLine: {{q}}: {{yes}}% in favor, {{silent}}% of shares haven't voted yet.
committee.nothingWaitingBody: No overdue payments, no unassigned issues, no vote without a response.
committee.noChargesYet: No charges have been issued for this period yet.
committee.noFaultsOpen: No open issues. The last one was resolved without any follow-up.
committee.svcBody: Cleaning common areas, window washing, or a small repair from a vetted professional. Dispatch confirms the time.

resident.footDirect: you're paying the building directly — the money never passes through Tasker
resident.footNoQr: this building doesn't have a QR code set up yet, pay by bank transfer
resident.faultTrack: Track the progress of the issues you've reported.
resident.faultNew: Take a photo and send it. The committee assigns it, you see the progress.
resident.taskerBody: Cleaning, a small repair, or window washing from a vetted professional in a few taps.
resident.voteBodyResident: {{q}} — you'll see the result; the vote belongs to the unit owner.
resident.voteBodyOther: {{q}} — cast your vote from your phone.
